contract: zero-build streamed brute hi-D search: the training X IS the reference index (no separate build/add/load); cost = query + coordinate regression + the memory to hold X.

200k.index_note: no index — streamed brute search over X
200k.vs_parametric_transform: parametric map = constant-time forward pass (~430k rows/s, 14 MB checkpoint); kNN-regressor query scales O(n_train × D).

2m.index_note: no index — streamed brute search over X
2m.vs_parametric_transform: parametric map = constant-time forward pass (~430k rows/s, 14 MB checkpoint); kNN-regressor query scales O(n_train × D).
